message: this prompt asks to propagate Brainer changes to sibling repos — apply the propagate skill: commit canonical FIRST, then per sibling (sequentially, never parallel): --classify -> --apply-stale --apply-absent --adopt-new-skills --adopt-agents -> sibling install.sh -> --repo verify -> --post-check + adjacent vendored tests. Never overwrite CUSTOMIZED files; flag them for manual merge.

a propagation run was claimed complete without evidence of the harvest (reverse) lane in the last 20 tool uses — a run that only pushes and skips harvest is INCOMPLETE unless you state why; scan siblings for lesson artifacts (harvest/for-brainer/harvested/brainer-learn) or explicitly note the skip reason
